Grid.TextBlock:
EXECUTION MESSAGE
To the men of Strike Group MOLNIYA: our successful strike on the American logistics force yesterday has bought us time to continue our mission to reach India. Command informs me that the USS Enterprise is fully committed to finding and destroying us. Again, this is a great victory for the Soviet Union!
A major storm system is forming east of the Maldives. We will steam through it at best speed to put us in range of Indian territorial waters before the storm lifts. We should expect American air attack from the west as soon as the weather clears.
Intelligence has passed that Pakistani naval forces are working in concert with the Americans and will attempt to block our entry into Indian waters. Their forces are small and poorly armed. It is also likely the Americans will detach their surface forces to run east and attack us.
We will fight and destroy them if we must, but our escape will be more strategically valuable. Our ambassador in India has also informed me that their airbase at Cochin will be available for our aircraft for rebasing if needed.
Good luck, Comrades. It has been an honor to serve with you, and I will see you all in Cochin.
END OF MESSAGE
/s/ Markov
Cовершенно cекретно
После прочтения — уничтожить
